[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1100001 3
1 1110000 3
2 0101110 4
3 0000000 a
4 0000000 a
5 0000000 a
6 0100001 2
7 0011000 2

01 10 0111001 4
12 21 1111111 a
23 32 1111111 a
34 43 1110100 4
45 54 1100001 3 match 0
56 65 1110001 4
67 76 1111110 6
70 07 0101111 5

46 64 1110000 3 match 1

71 17 0111110 5

72 27 1101111 6

15 51 1111001 5
